elements.original_description: A warm, inviting scene of a diverse group of people standing together, smiling and holding hands. The background is pure white, emphasizing unity and connection. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A warm, inviting scene of a diverse group of people standing together, smiling and holding hands, in a photograph with soft, natural lighting and a sense of connection and joy. The background is pure white, clean and minimalist, emphasizing unity and connection. Professional high-resolution photograph, sharp focus, balanced composition, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
